publishNote: Build + ./publish.sh. Bump reviewVersion + versionNote for new uploads (Teams + version history on site). Set due for first-time review. See teams-notifications-guide.txt.
commentsApiNote: Optional full URL if review page is on Webflow but API is on Netlify. Leave empty when the whole site is on Netlify.
messagingDocsNote: Populated at build from messaging-sources.json + OneDrive .docx (see scripts/sync-messaging-docs.mjs)

dueForReview.title: The Signal · Newsletter Hub
dueForReview.summary: Newsletter hub — layout, featured issue, archive.

reviewBrief.description: The Signal hub is the customer-facing home for our newsletter—one stable place to find every issue as we publish.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: overall look and feel, and any design suggestions before we promote it.

dueForReview.title: The Signal · Issue 01 (June 2026)
dueForReview.summary: Issue 01 — tone, Ameristar story, platform, team, Inside LUCI how-to.

reviewBrief.description: Issue 01 is the first full web edition of The Signal—welcome, field story, platform preview, team, Inside LUCI how-to, and services.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: the sections with instructions, steps, or services—confirm we've explained them correctly.

dueForReview.title: Newsletter email · The Signal Issue 01 teaser
dueForReview.summary: Inbox teaser — Issue 01 highlights, deep links, read-issue CTA. Footer tagline synced to Messaging Guide.
dueForReview.versionNote: Footer tagline updated to “The Orchestration Engine for Enterprise Multimedia” (Messaging Guide, Jun 9).

reviewBrief.description: Email that announces Issue 01 and drives readers to the web edition—welcome, story highlights with section links, and Mike's signature.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: copy, layout, and whether the teaser gives enough reason to open the full issue on the web.

versionHistory.note: Footer tagline synced to Messaging Guide.

approvedAssets.title: Case Study · Ameristar Council Bluffs
approvedAssets.summary: Ameristar case study — narrative, results, CTA.

reviewBrief.description: The Ameristar case study is the long-form Council Bluffs relocation and LUCI rollout story for the website, sales, and export.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: accuracy and story—whether we represented everything correctly.
